title: Warning Signs For The AI Boom, Anthropic Passes OpenAI, Robinhood’s AI Trading
summary: A podcast episode examining warning signs in the AI boom, including explosive token consumption leading companies to reconsider spending, low shipment rates for tokens spent, potential overinvestment cycles, and emerging developments like Anthropic's valuation milestone and AI-powered trading applications.
